name: survivaldev-plugins
description: Context-continuity and workflow-survival plugins for Claude Code.

plugins.name: handshake
plugins.description: Context-continuity for Claude Code. Checkpoints workflow state before compaction or clear events and rehydrates afterward.

plugins.name: survivaldev-infradoctor
plugins.description: Infrastructure doctor for self-hosted services such as Firecrawl and SearXNG. Hook-driven diagnosis, safe repair, and validation.

plugins.name: vibeflow
plugins.description: Mistral Vibe workflow orchestration for designing, planning, applying, inspecting, and validating agentic workflows.

plugins.name: converge
plugins.description: Universal recurring task engine for CLI AI agents. Cron-based scheduling, loop execution, and background task management.

plugins.name: prforge
plugins.description: Professional PR contribution harness for Claude Code. Delegated PR execution with guarded release, coding discipline enforcement, and distributed mesh mode.
